reviews.name: places/ChIJLXz11mkrT4gRkAw7XfojqsU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5bWJtbG1OSGwzUWxVeVpqVlVaSFZIVVVFemEyYxAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough great things about Gameday Men’s Health in Charleston! From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel comfortable and welcomed. The office is clean, modern, and professional, and the whole experience felt tailored to me as an individual. They took the time to really explain my options and made sure I understood everything about my treatment plan.

What stood out most was how encouraging and supportive the team is. The onsite lab made the process quick and convenient, and I was impressed with how efficient everything was from start to finish.

If you’re a guy looking to take control of your health, I highly recommend Gameday Men’s Health. It’s a game changer for Charleston!

reviews.name: places/ChIJLXz11mkrT4gRkAw7XfojqsU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s5ZmNVRXdSbVpWVW5oS01GRllPRk5CU0ZGWmEyYxAB
reviews.text: Just started today. I am impressed with everything!! Super professional and very nice and informative. Got recommended from a buddy of mine and I’m glad to start

reviews.name: places/ChIJLXz11mkrT4gRkAw7XfojqsU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tOTk1qVjZZVFJ3YVhsRFJEaHlUbVpDYzA1MmEyYxAB
reviews.text: GameDay Men’s Health has been great to me thus far.  I’m a physician myself and I went in for a consultation after years of monitoring my testosterone levels.  With our family being complete I was more open to replacement options.  The staff were warm and welcoming and the provider was knowledgeable about levels and dosing.  Almost one month in and feeling improvement already.  Can’t say enough good about GameDay and will recommend not only to my friends but patients.

reviews.name: places/ChIJLXz11mkrT4gRkAw7XfojqsU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1UGNEbFNhR0ZFZFhadmVEVndTSEEwZW5WRVZWRRAB
reviews.text: GameDay Men’s Health is a game changer.  I’ve been seeing them in the Charleston Office, the staff is amazing.  Wonderful customer service, they listen to your concerns and are compassionate about promoting physical and emotional wellness.  I’m completely satisfied with the care I am receiving and feel more energetic and better about myself.  Thank you GameDay Health!

reviews.name: places/ChIJLXz11mkrT4gRkAw7XfojqsU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25BNFozTXdjRzkyT0hSVVQyczJVM1pMU0cxR2VVRRAB
reviews.text: Gameday Men’s Health is a top quality facility! The providers are knowledgeable and the staff are friendly. What an amazing array of services being offered in Charleston!

reviews.name: places/ChIJO5GRkzV7NYgRcfshDpZkcOQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWQmVrbG5UREJxT0ZOZmRuSlNNamRqWkRobFYyYxAB
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with Renew Vitality. They demonstrate outstanding communication—they take the time to listen, explain everything clearly, and make you feel genuinely supported. What really sets them apart is their strong commitment to helping patients build and maintain a healthy lifestyle, not just treating symptoms. Their guidance is practical, encouraging, and tailored to long-term wellness. I highly recommend this clinic to anyone looking for professional care with a true focus on overall health and well-being.

reviews.name: places/ChIJO5GRkzV7NYgRcfshDpZkcOQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21sS2VFcFRhVU10Um5Wa1JUTmxaMlZhYW1OeVUyYxAB
reviews.text: Great program and great customer service.  The hormone treatment is personalized and it has been amazing as I get older.  Definitely brought back my energy levels and keeping me feeling young again.

reviews.name: places/ChIJO5GRkzV7NYgRcfshDpZkcOQ/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3cmVYTjNBRRAB
reviews.text: Renew Vitality has been absolutely amazing with my TRT treatment. I began my treatment under a different provider (no name bashing) but what an improvement, I thought I was happy before but now I feel completely dialed in. Anyone who has needed TRT treatment knows the benefits. A special thanks to Sam Bonasso for introducing me to peptides! Highly recommend!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJO5GRkzV7NYgRcfshDpZkcOQ/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBdG83VjJBRRAB
reviews.text: My experience with Renew Vitality and their team has been excellent. They take the time to understand your goals and work to make the process as easy as possible. If you're looking to improve your health, I highly recommend giving them a try.

reviews.name: places/ChIJO5GRkzV7NYgRcfshDpZkcOQ/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIbXJ6TzZBRRAB
reviews.text: I was 248lbs, tired, living  with a mass of brain fog before I started looking for answers. Renew Vitality made TRT simple and efficient. Id lie if I said I wasn’t hesitant taking the first step into the process, but Omar and my doctor helped me understand my test results, and laid out my options in a way that made me feel comfortable to ask every question holding me back. The treatments have improved my energy levels, recovery, and overall cognitive function. Im continually losing weight (230lbs) and seeing progress in my daily activity. Im very happy with the result and would recommend Omar Soler to anyone wanting to learn more.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNwFRb05LSIgRxuF9FbiHNcM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25sWlVsSnRaMmhqYTJwM1FWOTZhVk5FTWs1R1ptYxAB
reviews.text:
I had some symptoms and wasn't getting things resolved w insurance docs. I got in touch w Dr. Brooks, and became a patient of MHOP.  I cant express how much better the experience is with boutique medicine. It was hard to get anyone interested in treating me through the university healthcare system, unfortunately us men have symptoms that are often overlooked and i felt that my old dr just didnt care. Its been nearly a year since i signed up w MHOP and it was the best choice I've ever made.  My manhood is restored, I'm in phenomenal shape now and my circulatory problems are gone.
THANKS MHOP!

reviews.name: places/ChIJNwFRb05LSIgRxuF9FbiHNcM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21wR1JXVmlha3RUWlVKaVRqQkRNR3RKV0RabmIwRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Brooks and his staff are the best in the industry. Very professional and provide 5 star service to their patients. I have been a patient with their office for several years and I plan to continue to use their service for many more. I have had nothing but stellar results from being a patient with Men’s Health of Parkersburg. Dr. Brooks is very knowledgeable on dieting and promoting men to a healthier lifestyle. Having an Doctor available with messaging through their app service makes him easy to reach and they have always been quick to wiggle you into their schedule to make sure each patient has premiere care. A true asset to the Parkersburg medical community.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNwFRb05LSIgRxuF9FbiHNcM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pGWU0xRk9hVk41U1VkUlNrZzJlREJNYURKR2FWRRAB
reviews.text:
Men’s Health of Parkersburg:
First off, Thankyou Doctor Brooks for listening to my health concerns and addressing each one over the course of my 1hr 25minute stay, thankyou for the guidance and friendly approach to your medical practice, for not pressuring me into hurrying my appointment. For letting me make my own decisions and empowering me with the knowledge to do so.
I arrived, about 30minutes before my appointment, I knew walking in the facility the atmosphere was just like back in college. The camaraderie and energy of a collegiate sports medicine facility was a place I would feel welcomed in from the interior design of the office with well lit lobby and reception and being welcomed with a smile soon as I opened that door with open arms this is what you can expect here at Men's Health of Parkersburg.
I HIGHLY recommend for any man especially one new to Conceirge type medical services to not be hesistant, be courageous and give it a try. Its not scary, its not overly expensive, I promise. From reception Billy was eager to welcome me with a smile right when I walked in the front door. I was welcomed with a warm introductions, a checkup and sign in, then led to one of the clinical rooms, and asked "Hey Colin, whats your Tshirt Size?". This practice is humble, its direct, it gives a sense of purpose, utility and warmth that immediately puts patients at ease.
Their approach is rooted in professionally backed medical expertise, empowering you to make informed decisions with confidence, guided by their knowledge and care, Thankyou Doctor Brooks and thankyou Billy for the guidance and friendly approach to your medical practice, for the recommendations of other health professionals and fitness coaches. It's empowering to say the least. See you guys soon.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNwFRb05LSIgRxuF9FbiHNcM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25RNFZGWk5hV1pXUWsxRVFWbFNVRFpFVEhoaFFrRRAB
reviews.text:
A Professional Who Truly Listens – Highly Recommend Dr. Doug Brooks

I can’t say enough good things about Dr. Doug Brooks at Men’s Health of Parkersburg. From the very first appointment, it was clear that he genuinely cares about his patients. What really stood out to me was his ability to listen — not just to symptoms, but to concerns, goals, and even the things I didn’t know how to put into words.

Dr. Brooks made me feel comfortable and respected, and he asked questions that showed he was really paying attention. That kind of attentive care makes all the difference in treatment and trust.

If you’re looking for a provider who listens deeply and takes a personalized, professional approach to men’s health, Dr.  Doug Brooks is an outstanding choice.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNwFRb05LSIgRxuF9FbiHNcM/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3NTdXSlVnEAE
reviews.text: From reception to the meeting with Dr  Brooks, it is a welcoming and pleasant experience.  For the visits there is no 15 minute time limit.  He takes the time to make you feel understood and to understand.  I believe he takes the total person/holistic approach and I very much appreciate this.  He problem solves and his follow through is impeccable.  My sense of wellbeing has only been enhanced since MHOP has become my primary health provider.  I truly feel a sense of partnership with them in my health journey.  With no reservations, I gladly recommend the MHOP.
